## Summary

What does this PR change, and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup
- [ ] Tests only

## TDD evidence (required for `domain/` and `services/` changes)

- [ ] A failing test was committed before the implementation.
- [ ] The diff shows red → green progression in the git history.

If neither applies (UI tweak, doc change, etc.), explain why.

## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` is clean.
- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check .` is clean.
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes locally.
- [ ] Coverage on the changed module did not decrease.
- [ ] Public API changes are reflected in `ARCHITECTURE.md`, `README.md`, or `CHANGELOG.md` as applicable.
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or PII in the diff.

## Screenshots / output

For UI or CLI changes, paste a screenshot or output snippet.

## Related issues

Closes #
